data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Placed In Solitary Confinement After Unauthorized Interview
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Sam Bankman-Fried, commonly known as SBF, has been placed in solitary confinement following an unauthorized interview with Tucker Carlson. This development was reported on March 8 by Cointlegraph. The interview, which took place without permission, has led to this disciplinary action.

data.title: OCC Eases Crypto Regulations, Allowing Banks to Engage Without Prior Approval
data.description:
The post OCC Eases Crypto Regulations, Allowing Banks to Engage Without Prior Approval appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
The U.S. regulator overseeing national banks provided clarification on Friday that federally regulated banks can now engage in various cryptocurrency activities without needing prior approval.  In its new interpretive letter, the OCC clarified that national banks and...

data.title: Binance Whales Cash Out as Bitcoin Drops—More Downside Ahead?
data.description:
Bitcoin’s price has once again turned bearish after briefly recovering to $94,000 on Monday. Notably, the cryptocurrency had shown signs of strength earlier this week following a period of decline, but the recovery was short-lived. As of today, Bitcoin slipped below $90,000, marking a 1.8% decrease in the past 24 hours. According to CryptoQuant analyst Crazzyblockk, one key factor contributing...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/binance-whales-cash-out-as-bitcoin-drops-more-downside-ahead/

data.title: Jupiter Co-Creation: We have never and will never want to sell JUP tokens to meet operational needs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jupiter co-founder Meow posted on the X platform that all team members will be paid and receive cash bonuses, and never and hope never to need to sell any JUP to meet operational needs. Only those who have proven themselves to be crucial in the form of 1⃣️ founders or outstanding technicians can get a large amount of JUP.

data.title: SBF has been placed in solitary confinement after unauthorized interview with Tucker Carlson
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Polymarket posted on the X platform that SBF (Sam Bankman-Fried) has been held in solitary confinement after being interviewed by Tucker Carlson without permission. Earlier news, former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried recently appeared on Tucker Carlson's podcast, which was the latest stop on his media "image reshaping journey". On the show, SBF claimed that his 25-year sentence was partly due to his growing relationship with the Republican Party before his arrest.

data.title: The Supreme People's Procuratorate's Work Report: In 2024, 3,032 people were prosecuted for money laundering crimes such as using "virtual currency" to transfer criminal proceeds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ying Yong, Chief Prosecutor of the Supreme People's Procuratorate, delivered a work report of the Supreme People's Procuratorate at the Third Session of the 14th National People's Congress. In 2024, the procuratorate prosecuted 825 people for securities crimes such as financial fraud and insider trading, and prosecuted 3,032 people for money laundering crimes such as using "virtual currency" to transfer criminal proceeds. (The Paper)

data.title: The floating profit of a 20x short BTC address has grown to $4.886 million
data.description: According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst ai_9684xtpa, the floating profit of a 20x short BTC address has grown to 4.886 million US dollars. In addition, the 30x ETH short position of the address also has a floating profit of 190,000 US dollars, and the opening price is as high as 2,658 US dollars.
